title: The Ayanami Series is the 11th Angel
display_title: The Ayanami Series is the 11th Angel
wikitext:
[]: The Ayanami Series is the 11th Angel             Quote Post by AdamMalkovitch » Mon Sep 06, 2021 4:49 pm I know this has probably been theorized here before but I feel like a new thread for it is in order because holy shit. NTE Rei is never stated to have any link to the Angels like NGE Rei is. The only reason NGE Rei even had Lilith's soul as far as I'm aware is because in that timeline, clones can't exist without a soul, which is why the empty Rei bodies in the Dummy Plug plant are technically alive, but clearly have no thoughts behind those creepy eyes. We know for certain that in NTE, clones don't need to have souls injected into them, because SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: The Ayanami Series is the 11th Angel             Quote Post by Konja7 » Mon Sep 06, 2021 5:16 pm We don't have enough proof to assure Rei doesn't have Lilith's soul. There seems to be a strong connection between Lilith and Rei in Rebuild movirs. Although both are clones, Ayanami series and Shikiniami series aren't the same. Shikinami series seem to be totally independent beings. So, it's pretty likely each Shikinami clone has her own soul. This isn't the case with Ayanami clones. In 3.0, Kaworu mentioned the soul of Rei Q wasn't inside her body, which seems to imply that her soul is Rei II. We also should consider that Ayanami series was created by Gendo in order to get Yui back. So, her role in Gendo's plans was different from Shikinami series. That said, I think it's possible Rei become the 11th Angel when she fused with the 10th Angel (in a similar way that Kaworu become the 13th Angel when he fused with the 12th Angel).

[]: Re: The Ayanami Series is the 11th Angel             Quote Post by C.T.1290 » Mon Sep 06, 2021 5:46 pm If that’s the case, what does that make the Shikinami series?

[]: Re: The Ayanami Series is the 11th Angel             Quote Post by AdamMalkovitch » Mon Sep 06, 2021 7:09 pm Konja7 wrote: That said, I think it's possible Rei become the 11th Angel when she fused with the 10th Angel (in a similar way that Kaworu become the 13th Angel when he fused with the 12th Angel).

[]: Re: The Ayanami Series is the 11th Angel             Quote Post by Konja7 » Mon Sep 06, 2021 7:49 pm AdamMalkovitch wrote: But see, it wasn't Rei Q that fused with the 10th, it was Rei II. The SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: The Ayanami Series is the 11th Angel             Quote Post by andreh » Wed Sep 08, 2021 2:14 pm It's a good theory but I think that the 11th was a "normal" Angel. Also, it looks like that in the 3.333 extras (with early storyboards for Q) there's a screencap of an Angel: https://www.reddit.com/r/evangelion/com ... from_3333/ "There is an angel, Kaji alive, different events, more interactions with Kaworu and Rei. " Too bad we don't have a picture...
